messages.title: New sales are currently on a brief pause.
messages.body: I'm relocating to a new country, which means I need to pause sales temporarily while I set up a new payment processor. Don't worry, development will continue uninterrupted, and sales will be back online as soon as everything is set up. in the meantime, please check out the new update (version 30) which brings many bug fixes.

messages.title: Letterboxd Rate Limiting
messages.body: We've recently had an issue with Letterboxd implementing aggresive rate limiting which caused the Unfollower Finder to stop working. This has been resolved after 2 days and hopefully it was a one off anomaly. Please limit your scans to one a day for now to avoid further issues.
